scripts.version: node -e "let fs=require('fs'); let gExt=require('./gemini-extension.json'); gExt.version=process.env.npm_package_version; fs.writeFileSync('./gemini-extension.json', JSON.stringify(gExt, null, 2) + '\n'); let cExt=require('./codex-extension.json'); cExt.version=process.env.npm_package_version; fs.writeFileSync('./codex-extension.json', JSON.stringify(cExt, null, 2) + '\n');" && git add gemini-extension.json codex-extension.json
